840	func TestExecuteBeadLoop_NiflheimEvidence_LandCoordinationFailureDoesNotRerunImplementation(t *testing.T) {
   841		tests := []struct {
   842			name            string
   843			reportFunc      func(t *testing.T, beadID string) ExecuteBeadReport
   844			wantStatus      string
   845			wantDetail      string
   846			wantBead        string
   847			wantPreserveRef bool
   848		}{
   849			{
   850				name: "cannot lock ref after result already landed reconciles",
   851				reportFunc: func(t *testing.T, beadID string) ExecuteBeadReport {
   852					repo := initReportTestRepo(t)
   853					base := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   854					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(repo, "already.txt"), []byte("landed\n"), 0o644))
   855					gitReportTest(t, repo, "add", "already.txt")
   856					gitReportTest(t, repo, "commit", "-m", "already landed")
   857					result := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   858					res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
   859						BeadID:    beadID,
   860						AttemptID: "20260608T010203-reconcile",
   861						BaseRev:   base,
   862						ResultRev: result,
   863						ExitCode:  0,
   864						Outcome:   ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskSucceeded,
   865						SessionID: "sess-reconcile",
   866					}
   867					MarkResultLandError(repo, res, errors.New("git update-ref refs/heads/main: fatal: cannot lock ref 'refs/heads/main': is at abc but expected def: exit status 128"))
   868					return ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, "standard")
   869				},
   870				wantStatus: ExecuteBeadStatusSuccess,
   871				wantDetail: "land coordination reconciled",
   872				wantBead:   bead.StatusClosed,
   873			},
   874			{
   875				name: "staged generated evidence retries land",
   876				reportFunc: func(t *testing.T, beadID string) ExecuteBeadReport {
   877					repo := initReportTestRepo(t)
   878					base := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   879					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(repo, "evidence.txt"), []byte("landed evidence\n"), 0o644))
   880					gitReportTest(t, repo, "add", "evidence.txt")
   881					gitReportTest(t, repo, "commit", "-m", "landed evidence")
   882					result := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   883					res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
   884						BeadID:    beadID,
   885						AttemptID: "20260608T010203-retry",
   886						BaseRev:   base,
   887						ResultRev: result,
   888						ExitCode:  0,
   889						Outcome:   ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskSucceeded,
   890						SessionID: "sess-retry",
   891					}
   892					MarkResultLandError(repo, res, errors.New("landing worktree has staged changes after waiting 2s:\nM\t.ddx/beads.jsonl\nM\t.ddx/executions/20260608T010203-retry/result.json"))
   893					return ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, "standard")
   894				},
   895				wantStatus:      ExecuteBeadStatusLandRetry,
   896				wantDetail:      "land coordination retry",
   897				wantBead:        bead.StatusOpen,
   898				wantPreserveRef: true,
   899			},
   900			{
   901				name: "staged implementation work parks for operator attention",
   902				reportFunc: func(t *testing.T, beadID string) ExecuteBeadReport {
   903					repo := initReportTestRepo(t)
   904					base := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   905					require.NoError(t, os.WriteFile(filepath.Join(repo, "feature.go"), []byte("package main\n"), 0o644))
   906					gitReportTest(t, repo, "add", "feature.go")
   907					gitReportTest(t, repo, "commit", "-m", "landed feature")
   908					result := gitReportTest(t, repo, "rev-parse", "HEAD")
   909					res := &ExecuteBeadResult{
   910						BeadID:    beadID,
   911						AttemptID: "20260608T010203-operator",
   912						BaseRev:   base,
   913						ResultRev: result,
   914						ExitCode:  0,
   915						Outcome:   ExecuteBeadOutcomeTaskSucceeded,
   916						SessionID: "sess-operator",
   917					}
   918					MarkResultLandError(repo, res, errors.New("landing worktree has staged changes after waiting 2s:\nM\t.ddx/beads.jsonl\nM\tcli/internal/agent/foo.go"))
   919					return ReportFromExecuteBeadResult(res, "standard")
   920				},
   921				wantStatus:      ExecuteBeadStatusLandOperatorAttention,
   922				wantDetail:      "land coordination operator attention",
   923				wantBead:        bead.StatusProposed,
   924				wantPreserveRef: true,
   925			},
   926		}
   927	
   928		for _, tt := range tests {
   929			t.Run(tt.name, func(t *testing.T) {
   930				store, first, _ := newExecuteLoopTestStore(t)
   931				var calls atomic.Int32
   932				var escalationCalls atomic.Int32
   933				worker := &ExecuteBeadWorker{
   934					Store: store,
   935					Executor: ExecuteBeadExecutorFunc(func(ctx context.Context, beadID string) (ExecuteBeadReport, error) {
   936						calls.Add(1)
   937						return tt.reportFunc(t, beadID), nil
   938					}),
   939					EscalationNextFloor: func(actualPower int) (int, error) {
   940						escalationCalls.Add(1)
   941						return actualPower + 10, nil
   942					},
   943				}
   944	
   945				cfgOpts := config.TestLoopConfigOpts{Assignee: "worker"}
   946				rcfg := config.NewTestConfigForLoop(cfgOpts).Resolve(config.TestLoopOverrides(cfgOpts))
   947				result, err := worker.Run(context.Background(), rcfg, ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime{Once: true})
   948				require.NoError(t, err)
   949				require.NotNil(t, result)
   950				require.Len(t, result.Results, 1)
   951				assert.Equal(t, tt.wantStatus, result.Results[0].Status)
   952				assert.Equal(t, int32(1), calls.Load(), "land coordination must not schedule a fresh implementation run")
   953				assert.Zero(t, escalationCalls.Load(), "land coordination must not escalate model power")
   954				assert.Contains(t, result.Results[0].Detail, tt.wantDetail)
   955				if tt.wantPreserveRef {
   956					assert.NotEmpty(t, result.Results[0].PreserveRef, "land coordination evidence should preserve the result ref")
   957				} else {
   958					assert.Empty(t, result.Results[0].PreserveRef, "reconciled land coordination should not need a preserve ref")
   959				}
   960	
   961				got, err := store.Get(context.Background(), first.ID)
   962				require.NoError(t, err)
   963				assert.Equal(t, tt.wantBead, got.Status)
   964	
   965				switch tt.wantStatus {
   966				case ExecuteBeadStatusSuccess:
   967					assert.Equal(t, 1, result.Successes)
   968					assert.Contains(t, result.Results[0].Detail, "land coordination reconciled")
   969				case ExecuteBeadStatusLandRetry:
   970					assert.Equal(t, 1, result.Failures)
   971					assert.Equal(t, FailureModeLandRetry, result.Results[0].OutcomeReason)
   972					assert.True(t, result.Results[0].Disrupted)
   973					events, err := store.Events(first.ID)
   974					require.NoError(t, err)
   975					assert.Condition(t, func() bool {
   976						for _, ev := range events {
   977							if ev.Kind == "land-coordination" && ev.Summary == "retry-land" {
   978								return true
   979							}
   980						}
   981						return false
   982					}, "retry-land action event must be recorded")
   983				case ExecuteBeadStatusLandOperatorAttention:
   984					assert.Equal(t, 1, result.Failures)
   985					assert.Equal(t, FailureModeLandOperatorAttention, result.Results[0].OutcomeReason)
   986					meta := bead.GetNeedsHumanMeta(*got)
   987					assert.Contains(t, meta.Reason, "land coordination operator attention")
   988				}
   989			})
   990		}
   991	}

    19	func (l testEscalationLadder) Next(actualPower int) (int, error) {
    20		for _, floor := range l.floors {
    21			if floor > actualPower {
    22				return floor, nil
    23			}
    24		}
    25		return 0, errTestLadderExhausted{}

   145	func TestHighestViableEscalationFloorTerminatesOnNonMonotonicLadder(t *testing.T) {
   146		// fixedFloorLadder.Next always returns 5 without erroring. Without the
   147		// monotonic-progress guard, highestViableEscalationFloor would loop
   148		// forever. With the guard, it terminates and returns the floor it
   149		// observed.
   150		floor, err := highestViableEscalationFloor(fixedFloorLadder{floor: 5})
   151	
   152		assert.NoError(t, err)
   153		assert.Equal(t, 5, floor)
   154	}

   156	func TestZeroConfigInitialMinPowerStandardEmptyLadderDegradesWithNote(t *testing.T) {

   158	
   159		minPower, report, note, unavailable := zeroConfigInitialMinPower(b, policyescalation.PowerStandard, 0, 0, testEscalationLadder{floors: nil})

Implemented the land-coordination regression coverage, but I did not commit because the full suite is still red in unrelated existing cmd/integration tests.

Changed:
- [cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-bced4e39-20260608T153923-08f5023a/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop_test.go#L840) now uses real git fixtures for the `cannot lock ref` and staged-evidence cases, and asserts reconcile vs retry-land vs operator-attention behavior plus preserve-ref behavior.
- [cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_decision_audit_test.go](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-bced4e39-20260608T153923-08f5023a/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_decision_audit_test.go#L160) adds `TestExecuteBeadResult_NiflheimEvidence_LandCoordinationDecisionAudit` covering result JSON and event-body audit fields for retry-land, operator-attention, and reconcile paths.
- [cli/cmd/agent_execute_loop_escalation_test.go](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-bced4e39-20260608T153923-08f5023a/cli/cmd/agent_execute_loop_escalation_test.go#L228) adds `TestWorkRetryEscalation_NiflheimEvidence_LandCoordinationDoesNotRaiseMinPower`, proving land coordination does not raise MinPower or profile.
- [no_changes_rationale.txt](/Users/erik/Projects/.ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-bced4e39-20260608T153923-08f5023a/.ddx/executions/20260608T153923-08f5023a/no_changes_rationale.txt#L1) records the blocker required by the bead contract.

Verification:
- `go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... -run 'NiflheimEvidence|LandCoordination|RetryEscalation|LandCoordinationDecisionAudit' -count=1` passed.
- `go test ./internal/agent/... ./cmd/... -count=1` failed in unrelated existing tests, so I stopped short of committing.
